title: Tangy Cheesy Kenyan Eggs Frittata
description: A quick, tangy and gooey Kenyan-style frittata that blends eggs, sharp cheddar, sauteed onions, tomatoes, and green chili for a low-carb breakfast fix.
instructions: Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat and add the shortening until melted.
Add the diced onion and sauté for 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Stir in the chopped green chili and diced tomato, cooking for another 2 minutes until the tomato softens.
Whisk the eggs in a bowl and pour them over the sautéed mixture, tilting the pan to spread the eggs evenly.
Cook the eggs for 1-2 minutes until the edges start to set, then sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese evenly on top.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and let the frittata steam for 3-4 minutes until the cheese is melted and the eggs are fully set.
Season the frittata with salt and black pepper, then fold in the chopped spinach if using.
Remove the skillet from heat, garnish with fresh cilantro, and let it rest for 1 minute.
Slice the frittata into 8 wedges and serve hot.
